descript.abstract: These data describe the approximate project location and financial elements of US Forest Service, Great American Outdoors Act (GAOA) projects that are implemented through a Grant and/or Agreement. Data is visible at all scales and zoom levels.
descript.purpose: This feature class (sourced from existing Forest Service databases) provides summary level information on FS GAOA project grants and agreements for external accomplishment reporting.

timeperd.current: Data is are current as of publication date

idinfo.useconst: The USDA Forest Service makes no warranty, expressed or implied, including the warranties of merchantability and fitness for a particular purpose, nor assumes any legal liability or responsibility for the accuracy, reliability, completeness or utility of these geospatial data, or for the improper or incorrect use of these geospatial data. These geospatial data and related maps or graphics are not legal documents and are not intended to be used as such. The data and maps may not be used to determine title, ownership, legal descriptions or boundaries, legal jurisdiction, or restrictions that may be in place on either public or private land. Natural hazards may or may not be depicted on the data and maps, and users should exercise due caution. The data are dynamic and may change over time. The user is responsible to verify the limitations of the geospatial data and to use the data accordingly.

cntorgp.cntorg: USFS Chief Information Office, Enterprise Data Warehouse

cntinfo.cntvoice: Please send an e-mail to the address below.

horizpa.horizpar: 1)on screen digitizing with a georeferenced topographic or image background

enttyp.enttypd: Feature class: A collection of geographic features with the same geometry type (such as point, line, or polygon), the same attributes, and the same spatial reference.

attr.attrdef: Internal feature number.

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: The database generated control number (primary key) that uniquely identifies the project record. Example:"6261400010602"
The amount of monetary and non-monetary funds the Forest Service is contributing to the agreement.
All partner groups included on a grant or agreement.
Unit specified project name
Unique grant or agreement identifier.Example: "22PA11010300019"
Program defined alpha numeric project identifier
Concatenated list of NRM designated congressional districts.List of values may have to be broken into separate columns to provide for filter functionality on embedded map.
Spelled out name of Admin Unit.
The total amount of monetary and non-monetary funds on the grant or agreement.
Value that Indicates signifying project progress. Example: "WORK IN PROG"

edom.edomvd: Value that Indicates signifying project progress.
Value that Indicates signifying project progress.
Value that Indicates signifying project progress.
Value that Indicates signifying project progress.
Value that Indicates signifying project progress.
Value that Indicates signifying project progress.
Value that Indicates signifying project progress.

attr.attrdef: Unit composed project summary
Concatenated list of State abbreviations and County names. List of values may have to be broken into separate columns to provide for filter functionality on embedded map.
Spelled out Region Name
The NAMP project type, based on funding stream. Examples: CIM, FLTP, GAOA, etc.
The amount of monetary and non-monetary funds the partner group is contributing to the agreement.
The primary partner group on a grant or agreement.
Regional Numeric ID
A count of unqiue road assests addressed by each project. To be calculated using tables listed in the NRM Table Name column.
A unique count of road assests addressed by each project. To be calculated using tables listed in the NRM Table Name Column.
A count of unique rec sites addressed by each project. To be calculated using tables listed in the NRM Table Name Column.
A count of unique admin sites addressed by each project. To be calculated using tables listed in the NRM Table Name Column.
The user identified latitude for the overall project location

attrdomv.udom: Numerical value for project location latitude.

attr.attrdef: The user identified longitude for the overall project location.

attrdomv.udom: Numerical value for project location longitude.

attr.attrdef: Feature geometry.

cntorgp.cntorg: USFS Chief Information Office, Enterprise Data Warehouse

cntinfo.cntvoice: Please send an e-mail to the address below

distinfo.distliab: The U.S. Forest Service makes no warranty, express or implied, nor assumes any liability or responsibility for the accuracy, reliability, completeness, or utility of these geospatial data or for the improper or incorrect use of those data. The data are dynamic and may change over time. The user is responsible for verifying the limitations of the geospatial data and for using the data accordingly.

cntorgp.cntorg: USFS Chief Information Office, Enterprise Data Warehouse

metainfo.metstdn: FGDC Content Standard for Digital Geospatial Metadata
